title: abutilon × violaceum-purpureum
intro: Abutilon × violaceum-purpureum, also known as Abutilon × hybridum, is a rare and hybrid plant species that belongs to the Malvaceae family. It is known for its unique and vibrant purple-colored flowers, often used in ornamental purposes. Abutilon × violaceum-purpureum has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever, cough, and respiratory issues, due to its anti-inflammatory and expectorant properties. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, offering health benefits such as relieving bronchitis, sore throats, and other respiratory conditions.
